_comment: ── ADD these keys to your existing locales/en.json ──────────────────────

start.title: Add Vimar Wheel Thermostat
start.body: Make sure your Vimar 02973.B thermostat is powered and within range of your Homey.

searching.title: Searching...
searching.body: Press and hold the wheel button for 5 seconds until the LED blinks rapidly.

found.title: Found!
found.body: Your Vimar Wheel Thermostat has been found. Give it a name.
